headline: Sands China Drives MICE Development to Advance Macao's Economic Diversification
summary: Since the opening of Sands® Macao in 2004, Sands China Ltd. has remained committed to contributing to Macao's development into a World Centre of Tourism and Leisure. As a trailblazer of Macao's integrated resort model, Sands China has placed hospitality, retail, entertainment, and MICE (meetings, incentives, conferences and exhibitions) at the core of its non-gaming development strategy.
